sentences_input.text: And I-- and in the face of all this, this distortion and revisionism, which is just plain lies, I just so much want to do my share of, of talking face to face to people, especially young people, and tell them my story, which is, which is a history-- not my story, his story, her story, bigger than my story.
And, and, and while I tell it, maybe I will have, one day, an idea of what can we really do to avoid anything like this in the future.
